title: Rakuto's Mystical Adventure
description: Adds abilities, items, mobs and other mystical things to your Minecraft adventure
body:
![Rakutos Mystical Adventure Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e323e837cac6b5bd1b0d7e593e50ef377d5577e6.png)

Rakuto's Mystical Adventure adds mystical roots to the world, some of which possess a special essence. These mystical essence logs can only be traded with a mystic villeger in order to obtain the essence. With the essence, a mystical table, and an essence holder, you can give almost all variations of chest plates an ultimate ability to unleash their ancient and true power.

This mod also adds new plants and new materials like aquamarine, flower steel ingots and wild boar fur which can be crafted into new armor and tools that fit the vanilla style of Minecraft.

There are also 2 new mobs: The wild boar and the essence eater.

 

I am also planning to add new dimension, bosses, new mobs and high end armor and tools in future updates.
